package rulefixtures

// scenario for allocation_churn_in_loop: Obvious make, new, or buffer-construction calls inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule437PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario437Positive(records []Rule437PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
